The Vats: Gigantic, ancient pickle vats line the left side of the factory. The brine inside them seems… unnaturally still.
The Conveyor Belts: Rusted and long abandoned, the belts still have half-sealed jars on them. Something ''green'' is glowing inside the jars.
The Office: A rickety staircase leads up to the old factory office. The door is barely hanging on its hinges, and you swear you hear… whispering.
